name: Morgan, the Enchantress of Avalon
name_jp: アヴァロンの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>モルガン
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect, while you control a "Noble Knight" monster and a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY; destroy 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell you control, and if you do, negate the activation. You can only use this effect of "Morgan, the Enchantress of Avalon" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect, while you control a "Noble Knight" monster and a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY; destroy 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell you control, and if you do, negate the activation. You can only use this effect of "Morgan, the Enchantress of Avalon" once per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect, while you control a "Noble Knight" monster and a "Noble Arms" Equip Spell (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand to the GY; destroy 1 "Noble Arms" Equip Spell you control, and if you do, negate the activation. You can only use this effect of "Morgan, the Enchantress of Avalon" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
